title: Graph editor configuration, legend, and export refinements
description: Relocated config import/export to the dataset and edit steps, implemented per-series legend visibility controls with an eye toggle in the appearance panel, and refined footnote styling with softer presentation. Improved export panel layout and capped embed dialog height.

title: Multi-chart export & embed overhaul
description: Embed the whole multi-chart workspace with a live scaled preview and one-click copy; split export into Export image and Export data buttons; added combined multi-chart image export, per-chart CSV, and multi-sheet Excel; and selectable image quality presets.

title: Decimal-places control and dashboard-style diverging bar
description: Added decimal-places appearance setting to format non-integer measure values across Plotly charts (hover tooltips, measure-axis ticks, value labels), and restyled the diverging bar with dashboard-style controls (threshold bucket colors, fixed value range, background track rail, minimal axis chrome) plus a new preset for one-click pace ranking styling.

title: Chart builder refactor and Zillow module planning
description: Refactored chart builder components, visualization rendering logic, and configuration store with comprehensive test coverage. Began planning the Zillow module with factsheet research and implementation guides.

title: Added diverging bar chart for RHNA module
description: Implemented diverging bar chart visualization for the RHNA Progress Report module.

title: Implemented RHNA Progress Report module
description: Implemented the RHNA Progress Report module backend, updated module specification and project spec, and added dashboard container.

title: Completed Population & Housing frontend and updated spec
description: Finished Population & Housing frontend implementation with update data capability and project specification updates.

title: Resolved Population & Housing refactor issues; validated the pipeline live
description: Implemented every flagged reliability, robustness, and efficiency fix for the Population & Housing pipeline — an immutable historical E-8 baseline with a Phase 0 builder and cold-start guard, hardened E-5 acquisition fallback, real per-row Source provenance, a per-vintage vacancy-rate correction, and a vectorized geographic classifier — then ran it end to end against the live 2020-2026 DoF E-5, fixing DoF's renamed workbook and its new per-county subtotal labels along the way.

title: Added changelog infrastructure
description: Implemented the changelog system with browser, filtering, and presentation components.

title: Rewrote refactor guides as as-built docs

title: Added 'view original data' to the module visualization tool
